instruction: In ~/Downloads/mock_downloads, copy only the top-level .png files into ~/Desktop/selected_pngs. Do not copy non-png files or anything inside subdirectories. Then create ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/selected_count.txt containing exactly count=2.

parameters.command:
rm -rf ~/Downloads/mock_downloads ~/Desktop/selected_pngs && mkdir -p ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/subdir && printf 'png1
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/chart.png && printf 'png2
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/logo.png && printf 'jpg
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/photo.jpg && printf 'nested
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/subdir/deep.png

result.command: ok=1; [ -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/chart.png ] || ok=0; [ -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/logo.png ] || ok=0; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/photo.jpg ] || ok=0; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/deep.png ] || ok=0; status=$(cat ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/selected_count.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$status" = "count=2" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
